description: One of two students to acheive a first-class honours degree in Mechatronic Engineering at a Russell Group university. Focused on robotics, control, and embedded systems.

Working with award winning artist Jack Wimperis bringing to life sculptural lighting installations. Responsible for the electronic design software control for events such as Glastonbury, Boomtown, Leeds light night, and more.

Designing and installing custom anamatronic systems for various rooms in Wake The Tiger Amazement park. Work included a custom motion controller board used to make self-typing typewriters, Analogue thunderstorm effects, and aninteractive time machine dashboard.
Bought on to manufacture a completely custom wireless controller and motion driver for a client.
